# PERF-025 positive: rsa.GenerateKey in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-025-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/rsa"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func IssueToken(c *gin.Context) {
	priv, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"n": priv.N.String()})
}
